text: Which is  the  duties of a Deck rating

options.text: Monitor engine, machinery and equipment indicators and report abnormalities to ship engineer officer on watch
Lubricate moving chapters of engines, machinery and equipments
Steer ship under the direction of the officer on watch

explanation: A key duty of a deck rating includes steering the ship under the direction of the officer on watch, as per the helm orders. Monitoring machinery and lubricating are typically engine department duties.
